caption: A man wearing glasses, a white shirt, a red neckerchief, and a black vest performs on a stage in front of a seated audience. He stands behind a microphone and holds a guitar. In the background, there are vertical wooden wall panels. In the foreground, the backs of several audience members are visible, including women with blonde, grey, and brown hair. Some audience members wear blue and red clothing. The text "ORCA" is overlaid in white letters on a black background in the lower right of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his posture, moving his head and hand while continuing to play his guitar and sing into the microphone. To the far left in the beginning, another man is partially visible behind a podium. The overall scene remains consistent, capturing the performer from a perspective behind the audience.
